user.title: ESPEasy P2P
user.description: Listen for ESPEasy C013 broadcasts and actively scan for peers.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one ESPEasy P2P listener can be configured.

init.title: GPIO pin map
init.description: For each switch-eligible task you can either set a BCM GPIO pin (the integration will send 'gpio,<pin>,<state>'), or — for Output Helper / Domoticz Helper tasks that have no pin — provide a command template. The template is sent verbatim with '{state}' replaced by 0 or 1. Examples: 'event,door={state}' to trigger an ESPEasy rule, or 'door,{state}' to set the helper directly. Leave both fields empty to remove an entry. {task_count} task(s) discovered.

abort.no_switch_tasks: No switch-eligible tasks have been discovered yet. Wait for nodes to announce or run the 'Scan for nodes' service, then reopen this dialog.

scan.name: Scan for nodes
scan.description: Broadcast a node-info packet so all reachable ESPEasy nodes immediately announce themselves.
